category_sources: source_facts.description says Mongoose is a web server built on Libmongoose; official repository describes Mongoose as an embedded web server and network library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mongoose; official website and repository use Mongoose.
docs_sources: Official repository points to mongoose.ws for complete documentation; mongoose.ws/documentation is the dedicated documentation path.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/cesanta/mongoose, so repo is null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies web server/library; official repository lists TCP, UDP, HTTP, WebSocket, MQTT, C/C++, and embedded networking.
